title: Luffy on Amazon Lily
description: In the Amazon Lily storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #3, Unknown person #1, Whitebeard, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #4 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Amazon Lily conflict through Unknown person #3, Unknown person #1, Whitebeard, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy on amazon lily.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kyaaaa-1) They look so magnifi- Cent!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ufufufu... shall I swallow him whole?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Or perhaps I should strangle him?

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Shut up, that's for me to decide!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I just need to kick your asses!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He really thinks he can beat them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: How funny! Men are really funny!!

summary: This scene advances the Amazon Lily conflict through Unknown person #3, Unknown person #1, Whitebeard, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy on amazon lily.
